name: Back Squat
instructions: Rest the bar on your upper back, feet shoulder-width apart. Brace your core, sit down between your hips until your thighs are at least parallel, then drive back up through your whole foot.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Rack the bar across your front delts with elbows high. Keep your torso upright as you squat down, then stand up while keeping the elbows from dropping.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold a dumbbell vertically against your chest. Squat deep between your heels, keeping your chest tall, then stand back up.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Place feet shoulder-width on the platform. Lower under control until your knees reach about 90 degrees, then press back up without locking the knees hard.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Stand with the bar over mid-foot. Hinge down with a flat back, grip the bar, brace, and stand up by driving the floor away. Lock out with hips and knees together.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: From standing, push your hips back and lower the bar down your thighs with a flat back and soft knees. Stop when your hamstrings are fully stretched, then drive hips forward.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: With your upper back on a bench and the bar over your hips, drive your hips up until your torso is level. Squeeze the glutes at the top, then lower under control.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Place your rear foot on a bench behind you. Lower straight down until the front thigh is parallel, then push back up through the front foot.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward into a lunge until both knees reach about 90 degrees, then push off the front foot and step through into the next lunge.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit with the pad on your shins. Extend your knees to lift the weight, pause briefly at the top, and lower slowly.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: With the pad behind your ankles, curl your heels toward your glutes, squeeze, and return under control.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Rise up onto the balls of your feet as high as possible, pause, then lower until you feel a full stretch in the calves.

name: Bench Press
instructions: Lie with your eyes under the bar, feet planted. Lower the bar to your mid-chest with elbows about 45 degrees from your body, then press back up to lockout.

name: Incline Bench Press
instructions: Set the bench to about 30 degrees. Lower the bar to your upper chest and press it back up in a slight arc over your shoulders.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Press the dumbbells from chest level to lockout above your shoulders, keeping your shoulder blades pinched on the bench.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: On a 30-degree incline, lower the dumbbells to the sides of your upper chest and press them up and slightly together.

name: Cable Chest Fly
instructions: With a slight bend in the elbows, bring the handles together in front of your chest in a hugging arc, then let them open until you feel a chest stretch.

name: Push-Up
instructions: In a straight-body plank, lower your chest to just above the floor with elbows about 45 degrees out, then press back up.

name: Dip
instructions: Support yourself on parallel bars, lean slightly forward, lower until your shoulders are just below your elbows, then press back up.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge to about 45 degrees with a flat back. Pull the bar to your lower ribs, squeeze your shoulder blades, and lower under control.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: With one hand and knee on a bench, row the dumbbell to your hip, keeping your torso square, then lower with control.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from the bar with an overhand grip. Pull your chin over the bar by driving your elbows down, then lower to a full hang.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Hang with an underhand, shoulder-width grip. Pull your chin over the bar, keeping your body from swinging, then lower fully.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: With a wide grip, pull the bar to your upper chest while keeping your torso tall, then let it rise until your arms are fully stretched.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit tall with knees soft. Pull the handle to your stomach, squeezing the shoulder blades together, then let your arms extend fully.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Set the rope at face height. Pull it toward your face, splitting the rope beside your ears with elbows high, then return slowly.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: From the front rack, brace your glutes and core, press the bar straight overhead, and finish with the bar over the back of your head, arms locked.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Seated or standing, press the dumbbells from shoulder height to lockout overhead without flaring the ribs.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: With a slight elbow bend, raise the dumbbells out to your sides until your arms are parallel to the floor, then lower slowly.

name: Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Hinge forward with a flat back. Raise the dumbbells out to your sides with slightly bent elbows, squeezing the rear delts, then lower under control.

name: Barbell Shrug
instructions: Holding the bar at arm's length, shrug your shoulders straight up toward your ears, pause, and lower fully.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: With elbows pinned to your sides, curl the bar up to shoulder height without swinging, then lower until your arms are straight.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Curl the dumbbells up while rotating your palms toward you, keeping the elbows still, then lower with control.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: With palms facing each other, curl the dumbbells to shoulder height and lower slowly, keeping the wrists neutral.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: With your upper arms on the preacher pad, curl the bar up, then lower until your arms are almost fully extended.

name: Triceps Pushdown
instructions: With elbows pinned to your sides, push the handle down until your arms are straight, squeeze, and let it rise to about 90 degrees.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lying on a bench, lower the bar toward your forehead by bending only the elbows, then extend back to lockout.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Grip the bar just inside shoulder width. Lower to your lower chest with elbows tucked, then press up, focusing on the triceps.

name: Plank
instructions: On forearms and toes, hold a straight line from head to heels. Brace your abs and glutes; don't let the hips sag. Log duration in seconds as reps.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hanging from a bar, raise your legs until they are at least parallel to the floor, curling the pelvis up, then lower without swinging.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel below a high rope. Crunch your ribs toward your pelvis, rounding the spine, then return to a tall kneel.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: From your knees, roll the wheel forward as far as you can hold a flat back and braced core, then pull back with your abs.

name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Feet shoulder-width, arms out for balance. Squat until your thighs pass parallel, keeping your chest up, then stand. Slow the descent to make it harder.

name: Split Squat
instructions: In a long lunge stance, lower your back knee toward the floor and drive up through the front foot. Hold dumbbells to load it.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: On your back with knees bent, drive your hips up until your body is a straight line from knees to shoulders, squeeze, and lower slowly.

name: Pike Push-Up
instructions: From a downward-dog position with hips high, bend your elbows to lower the top of your head toward the floor, then press back up.

name: Inverted Row
instructions: Hang under a sturdy bar or table edge with your body straight. Pull your chest to the bar, squeezing your shoulder blades, then lower with control.

name: Chair Dip
instructions: Hands on the edge of a chair or bench behind you, legs extended. Lower until your elbows reach 90 degrees, then press back up.
